description: Clever Cloud is a platform-as-a-service for deploying and operating applications, add-ons, and related cloud services. It provides managed hosting, deployment, and operational tooling for developers.
summary: Clever Cloud exposes a REST HTTP API and an official CLI; both use Clever Cloud-issued OAuth 1.0a-style credentials (consumer key/secret plus user token/secret, with the CLI also supporting `CLEVER_TOKEN`/`CLEVER_SECRET`).
